programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Boom America is kicking off with a bang, led by the legendary shark himself, Kevin Harrington. Backed by his team of successful entrepreneurs, Kevin meets with businesses to jumpstart their success and take them to a whole new level. From Nuethix, a supplement line struggling with client acquisition and education, to Stream2Sea, a eco-friendly sunscreen wanting to become a household name—Kevin and the A-team are ready to jump in and get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Only three ladies remain in the battle for over $100,000 and the title of WPT Ladies Champion. Olga Iermolcheva has a commanding chip lead, but her competitors are showing no signs of backing down. Prepare for plenty of thrilling poker action under the lights at Wynn Las Vegas as we play down to the crowning of the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The final table of the inaugural WPT Prime Championship at Wynn Las Vegas is underway. The $2 million guaranteed prizepool event saw a record-setting turnout of 5,430 entries, nearly tripling the guarantee, which means that the eventual winner will walk away with over $700,000 and the title of the first ever WPT Prime Champion.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: We are down to the final four players of the first ever WPT Prime Championship. With so much at stake, nobody is willing to settle for anything less than first place. Over $700,000 will be awarded to the victor. Don’t miss a second of the action as WPT high stakes tournament poker action continues at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: Big pots are being pushed all around the table as the final four players of the WPT Prime Championship battle for a first place prize of over $700,000 and the title of WPT Prime Champion. Unpredictable bluffs and big bets for value are in abundance as the WPT Prime Championship final table continues at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: The final three players battle it out at the final table of the WPT Prime Championship where the winner will receive $712,650 to go along with the title of WPT Prime Champion. The fans are fired up and the players are focused on the task at hand. Join us as we crown the first ever WPT Prime Champion.

programme.title: Mount Royal Flush - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: As our third day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal carries on, we showcase some hands we can't believe and some names we can't pronounce. Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: The City of Saints - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We conclude our final day of filming with the pros at partypoker at the Playground Poker Club in Montreal Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Jason Koon, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: Hanson Family Values - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Our first day of high stakes cash kicks off at Choctaw Casino, where Kyle Bowker puts on a poker clinic and runs over this table full of sharks! Featuring Bart Hanson, Kane Kalas, Mike Ross, Kyle Bowker, David Baker, Douglas Lorgeree and Sean Mates.

programme.title: The Butcher, The Baker, The Over Pair Maker - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Can anything stop Kyle Bowker? Apparently not the sharks at this high stakes cash game. It's the secone half of day one here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Bart Hanson, Kane Kalas, Mike Ross, Kyle Bowker, David Baker, Douglas Lorgeree, Bobby Greeson and Sean Mates.

programme.title: The Canadian Sensation - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: It's the return of everyone's favorite poker degen to the Poker Night table: the Canadian sensation Gavin Smith! Witness his greatness for the start of day two here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Matt Glantz, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Maxx Coleman

programme.title: Mclintock! 1963
programme.desc: John Wayne leads the charge in McLintock!, a rip-roaring Western comedy brimming with action, romance, and frontier spirit. As wealthy cattle baron George Washington McLintock tries to keep the peace between feuding homesteaders, rowdy cowhands, and local Native tribes, he also faces his toughest battle yet—his fiery estranged wife (Maureen O’Hara), who’s just returned to town. Filled with slapstick brawls, lively banter, and heartwarming humor, McLintock! delivers classic Western entertainment with larger-than-life charm.
